checks.description: After exactly eight consecutive cycles where din_valid is high, dout_valid must transition high for one cycle and dout_parallel must equal the concatenation of the eight din_serial bits in the order they were received (MSB first).
checks.pass_condition: When a sequence of eight valid serial bits is presented, a single-cycle dout_valid pulse occurs and the parallel output matches the captured byte.
checks.trigger_condition: When the stimulus drives eight consecutive valid serial bits.

checks.description: dout_valid must remain low until eight valid serial bits have been received.
checks.pass_condition: dout_valid is 0 for all cycles before the eighth valid din_valid assertion.
checks.trigger_condition: During any serial transfer of up to eight bits.

checks.description: The interface must not assert dout_valid or change dout_parallel before a complete group of eight valid serial bits has been received.
checks.pass_condition: No change in dout_parallel and dout_valid stays low until the eighth valid din_valid cycle.

checks.description: After a dout_valid pulse, the next dout_valid pulse must occur only after another eight valid serial bits, ensuring the counter restarts for a new byte.
checks.pass_condition: The interval between consecutive dout_valid pulses corresponds to exactly eight din_valid cycles.
